Potential savings up to $50K+ annually

Overcoming Self-Employed Lending Challenges

Common Challenges Business Owners Face:

  • ❌ Variable income streams and seasonal fluctuations
  • ❌ Complex tax returns with deductions reducing taxable income
  • ❌ Limited PAYG employment history
  • ❌ Business income not recognized by traditional lenders
  • ❌ Longer processing times and documentation requirements
  • ❌ Higher interest rates due to perceived risk

Our Specialised Solutions:

  • ✅ Alternative income verification methods
  • ✅ BAS statements and business banking analysis
  • ✅ Asset-based lending options
  • ✅ Relationship with self-employed specialist lenders
  • ✅ Streamlined documentation processes
  • ✅ Competitive rates for business owners

Flexible Documentation Options

Full Documentation

Best Rates & Terms

  • 2 years of tax returns
  • Financial statements (if company)
  • BAS statements
  • Bank statements (6-12 months)
  • Accountant verification letter
Lowest rates - from 5.89% p.a.*

Alternative Documentation

Streamlined Process

  • 12 months bank statements
  • BAS statements or business activity
  • ABN registration details
  • Accountant letter
  • Asset verification
Competitive rates - from 6.29% p.a.*

Low Documentation

Simplified Verification

  • Income declaration
  • Business registration proof
  • Asset and liability statement
  • Minimal bank statements
  • Property as primary security
Fast approval - from 6.89% p.a.*

Investment Property Strategies for Business Owners

Negative Gearing Strategy

Use rental losses to reduce taxable income while building long-term capital growth.

Example: $800K property, 80% LVR, $500/week rent
Annual tax benefit: $8,000 - $15,000

Positive Cash Flow

Generate immediate rental income to supplement business cash flow and lifestyle.

Example: $450K regional property, 80% LVR, $420/week rent
Annual cash flow: $2,000 - $6,000 positive

Portfolio Building

Use equity from existing properties to acquire additional investment properties.

Example: Use $200K equity from home to purchase 2 properties
Total portfolio value: $1.5M+ with diversified income

SMSF Property Investment

Purchase investment properties within your Self-Managed Super Fund for tax advantages.

Example: $600K property in SMSF with limited recourse loan
Tax rate: 15% in accumulation, 0% in pension phase

Our Personal Lending Process

1

Personal Consultation

Comprehensive discussion of your personal property goals, business situation, and financial capacity to determine optimal lending strategy.

2

Pre-Approval Strategy

Secure pre-approval with appropriate lending capacity, giving you confidence to negotiate and purchase with competitive terms.

3

Property & Documentation

Professional guidance through property selection, valuation process, and streamlined documentation management.

4

Settlement & Ongoing

Seamless settlement process and ongoing relationship management for refinancing and portfolio growth opportunities.

Why Business Owners Choose EVFBS for Personal Lending

Self-Employed Expertise

Deep understanding of business owner challenges and specialised lender relationships that cater specifically to self-employed income verification.

Holistic Financial Strategy

Integration of personal and business finance strategies to optimize tax benefits, cash flow, and long-term wealth creation goals.

Competitive Rates Access

Access to wholesale lending rates and specialised self-employed products not available directly to consumers through major banks.

Investment Strategy Guidance

Professional investment property advice including location analysis, rental yield assessment, and portfolio structuring for optimal returns.

Ongoing Relationship

Continuous support for refinancing opportunities, portfolio expansion, and changing personal circumstances throughout your property journey.

Comprehensive Solutions

One-stop solution covering home loans, investment property, construction finance, and business lending requirements.

Extensive Lender Panel for Best Outcomes

Major Banks

Competitive rates for strong applicants with traditional income verification

Self-Employed Specialists

Lenders who understand and cater specifically to business owner income structures

Non-Bank Lenders

Alternative lenders offering flexible terms and faster approval processes

Investment Specialists

Lenders focused on investment property finance with competitive investor rates

Our extensive panel ensures we find the right lender match for your specific situation and goals.
